allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('main:', p.main\); console.log\('types:', p.types\); console.log\('exports:', JSON.stringify\(p.exports, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { Chess } = require\('chess.js'\); const c = new Chess\(\); c.loadPgn\('1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6'\); console.log\('fen:', c.fen\(\)\); const moves = c.history\({verbose: true}\); console.log\('sample move:', JSON.stringify\(moves[0]\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\); print\('exports:', json.dumps\(d.get\('exports', {}\), indent=2\)[:1000]\)")
